title: MCP / Tooling Activation Governance
source_of_truth: Live Hermes tool registry/config discovery for activation state
Brain hub as governance snapshot/index only
MCP skills as procedure references outside Brain repo when applicable
guardrails: Brain is a snapshot/index; live source wins for current state.
No external writes, runtime changes, secrets, customer messages, purchases, campaigns or production changes without scoped approval.
Receipts/reports are evidence, not current operational approval.
